mapper.sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.employee_no, u.password, u.name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.is_admin, u.is_active, u.must_change_password, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_department d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_user WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (employee_no, password, name, dept_id, is_admin, must_change_password) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{password}, #{name}, #{deptId}, #{isAdmin}, #{mustChangePassword})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
